name: Zoodiac Whiptail
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>十</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>二</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>に</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヴァイパー
name_jp_tl: Viper of the Twelve Zodiac Beasts
desc:
(Quick Effect): You can target 1 Beast-Warrior Xyz Monster you control; attach this card from your hand or field to it as material. An Xyz Monster whose original Type is Beast-Warrior and has this card as material gains this effect.
● If this card battles an opponent's monster, after damage calculation: Banish that opponent's monster.

action: Attaches itself from your hand as Xyz Material
Attaches itself from your field as Xyz Material

banished: Banishes battling monster after damage calculation
